# AGENT_GUIDE

## Implemented
- GitHub automation scaffolding for PR/unit test validation.

## Pending
- Additional workflows (lint, security scan, release) are optional.

## Key Interfaces
- Workflow entrypoints under `.github/workflows`.

## Decisions and Trade-offs
- Added only required CI gate for challenge speed.

## Next Agent Checklist
- Keep CI fast and deterministic for reviewer confidence.
